name: Cheese-Potato Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the measurements for 4 servings and prepare as directed.
2. Prepare the basic meat loaf recipe except mix in half of the cheese.
3. Shape the mixture into a loaf in an ungreased baking pan, 13 X 9 X 2-inches.
4. Omit the catsup and bake as directed. Drain off the excess fat.
5. Prepare the potatoes as directed on the package except stir in the remaining cheese.
6. Spread the potatoes on the sides and top of the meat loaf.
7. Sprinkle with the crumbled bacon.
8. Bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the potatoes are lightly browned.
9. Serve hot.
